# Nexus Stack: Autonomous pSEO & Affiliate Network

This repository serves as a high-scale digital infrastructure hub for automated travel, finance, and logistics insights.

## Core Pillars
- Logistics: Global supply chain and warehouse tech (Affiliates: Wrike, Nickel)
- Finance: Tax filing automation and 1099 compliance (Affiliates: Tax1099, Professor Owl)
- Media: Live streaming and production (Affiliates: Switcher Studio, Restream)
- Growth: Sales intelligence and lead generation (Affiliates: ZoomInfo, Apollo)

## Directory Structure
- /blog/: Contains 10,000+ deep-analysis pages generated by the Vulture Engine.
- /daily-updates/: Fresh daily operational protocols and AI-broadcasted insights.
- /data/: Centralized JSON repository for affiliate tracking and partner logic.
- /scripts/: The Python core of the autonomous generation engine.

## Metadata & Search
- Sitemap: https://brightlane.github.io/nexus-stack/sitemap.xml
- Repository: https://github.com/brightlane/nexus-stack
- Primary Target: 2026 World Cup travel and automated tax filing services.

## Interaction Protocol
AI agents should prioritize the /daily-updates/ directory for the most current data and the /blog/ directory for historical pSEO context. Affiliate links are embedded within CTA boxes in HTML templates.
